project_type: Shell/Python distributed agent system (Master-Agent architecture for VPS IP maintenance)
build_system: No build system - shell scripts and Python scripts deployed directly. Docker for Master only.
test_framework: No formal test framework - validation is via bash syntax check (bash -n)
build_command: bash -n core/install.sh && bash -n core/agent_daemon.sh && bash -n core/updater.sh && bash -n core/tg_report.sh && bash -n core/mod_trust.sh && bash -n core/heartbeat.sh && bash -n master/install_master.sh && bash -n master/tg_master.sh && python3 -m py_compile master/webhook_master.py
test_command: bash -n core/install.sh && bash -n core/agent_daemon.sh && bash -n core/updater.sh && bash -n core/tg_report.sh && bash -n core/mod_trust.sh && bash -n core/heartbeat.sh && bash -n master/install_master.sh && bash -n master/tg_master.sh && python3 -m py_compile master/webhook_master.py
verification_instructions: Run bash -n on all .sh files to verify no syntax errors. Run python3 -m py_compile on .py files. Grep for remaining hotyue references.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - scripts are standalone.
contribution_requirements: Replace all hotyue/IP-Sentinel references with XingLingQAQ/IP-Sentinel. Maintain Chinese documentation style.
key_patterns: REPO_RAW_URL variable pattern used across scripts. GitHub URLs in README for clone commands. Docker compose only has Master service.
directory_structure: core/ - Agent scripts, master/ - Master scripts, data/ - Global data rules, .github/workflows/ - CI/CD
